data.title: Noronex Limited Announces Details for Upcoming Annual General Meeting
data.description:
Noronex Ltd. ( (AU:NRX) ) has provided an update.

Noronex Limited has announced the details of its upcoming Annual General Meeting (AGM) scheduled for November 10, 2025. The company is encouraging shareholders to participate in the voting process, either by proxy or in person, and emphasizes the use of electronic communications to reduce costs and improve efficiency. The AGM will be held at the company’s office in Subiaco, Western Australia, and any changes to the meeting arrangements will be communicated via the ASX Market Announcements Platform and the company’s website.

More about Noronex Ltd.

Noronex Limited is a company listed on the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX: NRX) that operates in the mining industry. It focuses on exploration and development of mineral resources, with a particular emphasis on copper exploration projects.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

data.title: Altech Batteries Director Alters Shareholding Structure
data.description:
An announcement from Altech Chemicals Limited ( (AU:ATC) ) is now available.

Altech Batteries Ltd has announced a change in the director’s interest, specifically involving Tunku Yaacob Khyra. The change involves the disposal of 22,450,000 fully paid ordinary shares valued at $1,212,182.57 through an on-market transfer. This adjustment reduces the number of ordinary shares held indirectly by Tunku Yaacob Khyra, impacting the overall shareholding structure of the company.

data.description:
The latest update is out from ARK Mines Ltd ( (AU:AHK) ).

Ark Mines Limited, a company listed on the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX: AHK), held an Extraordinary General Meeting on October 10, 2025. data.title: WCM Global Growth Ltd. Announces 2025 Annual General Meeting
data.description:
WCM Global Growth Ltd. ( (AU:WQG) ) has provided an update.

WCM Global Growth Limited has announced its 2025 Annual General Meeting, scheduled for November 12, 2025, in Sydney. The meeting will address key business items, including the consideration of financial statements, the adoption of the remuneration report, and the re-election of two non-executive directors. Shareholders are encouraged to participate by voting online or submitting proxy forms by November 10, 2025.

data.title: Lake Resources N.L. Announces Bonus Issue of Securities
data.description:
Lake Resources N.L. ( (AU:LKE) ) has issued an update.

Lake Resources N.L. announced a proposed bonus issue of securities, with a maximum of 226,788,594 options over ordinary shares to be issued. These options are exercisable at $0.05 each and will expire three years from the date of issue. This move could potentially enhance the company’s capital structure and provide additional resources for its ongoing lithium projects, thereby strengthening its position in the lithium market.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:LKE) stock is a Buy with a A$0.13 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Lake Resources N.L. stock, see the AU:LKE Stock Forecast page.

More about Lake Resources N.L.

Lake Resources N.L. operates within the mining industry, focusing on the exploration and development of lithium projects. The company is primarily engaged in producing lithium, a critical component for batteries, which is essential for the growing electric vehicle market.

data.title: Silicon Metals Corp. Announces Strategic Private Placements to Raise $200,000
data.description:
An update from West Oak Gold Corp. ( (TSE:SI) ) is now available.

Silicon Metals Corp. has announced its intention to undertake strategic private placements, aiming to raise up to $200,000 through non-flow-through and flow-through offerings. The funds from these offerings will be used for general working capital and to support exploration expenditures in British Columbia and Ontario. This move is designed to strengthen the company’s equity ownership base and support its ongoing projects, potentially enhancing its market position and providing opportunities for key investors who missed previous placements.

More about West Oak Gold Corp.

Silicon Metals Corp. is focused on exploration and development in Canada, particularly in British Columbia and Ontario. The company’s projects include the Maple Birch Project in Ontario, a high purity quartz pegmatite project, and several silica projects in British Columbia, such as the Ptarmigan Silica Project, Silica Ridge Silica Project, and Longworth Silica Project.

Average Trading Volume: 86,824

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$1.55M

data.title: Jayride Group Ltd. Strives for ASX Reinstatement Amid Strategic Growth
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Jayride Group Ltd. ( (AU:JAY) ).

Jayride Group Ltd. has been suspended from trading on the ASX due to financial condition concerns but remains operationally stable with ongoing support from investors. The company is actively working towards reinstatement by strengthening its balance sheet and has made significant strategic progress with new SaaS deployments in Thailand, highlighting its commitment to growth and financial stability.

More about Jayride Group Ltd.

Jayride Group Ltd. operates in the transportation industry, focusing on Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) solutions for airport transfers and peer-to-peer car-sharing platforms. The company is expanding its market presence in Thailand through partnerships with GB Limousine and Drivemate.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$8.69M

data.title: Sona Comstar Partners with NEURA Robotics for Advanced Robotics Development
data.description:
Sona BLW Precision Forgings Ltd. ( (IN:SONACOMS) ) has issued an announcement.

Sona Comstar has signed a memorandum of understanding with NEURA Robotics GmbH to jointly develop advanced technologies and industrialize robots and humanoids in India and other markets. This collaboration aims to leverage the rapid advancements in artificial intelligence and robotics to transform manufacturing and logistics industries, enhancing Sona Comstar’s position in the mobility space and expanding its reach into intelligent manufacturing and service industries.

More about Sona BLW Precision Forgings Ltd.

Sona BLW Precision Forgings Ltd., also known as Sona Comstar, is a global leader in mobility technology solutions with a strong focus on electric, personalized, intelligent, and connected (EPIC) technologies. The company is known for its capabilities in electric powertrains, including motors, inverters, and gearboxes.
